input.name: good_single_skill
input.description: Positive single-skill fixture for SkillGuard checker happy-path validation.
activation_boundary: Use this fixture when checking the positive single-skill contract path.
Use this fixture only with current local SkillGuard fixture commands.
do_not_use_boundary: Do not use this fixture to claim broad fixture coverage.
Do not use this fixture to claim package publication or release readiness.
required_workflow: Inspect the fixture SKILL.md and control records.
Run the local check-skill command against the fixture directory.
Keep closure evidence tied to direct current report and evidence files.
output_requirements: Report evidence, failures, blockers, skipped_checks, residual_risk, and claim_boundary.
List direct command output paths when current evidence is refreshed.
maintenance_synchronization: Refresh fixture command output after checker command behavior changes.
Do not use runtime ids, PM text, or progress ledgers as closure proof.
skipped_checks: Negative and stale fixture branches are intentionally outside this positive case.
residual_risk: This positive contract case does not exercise every checker branch.
input.claim_boundary: This fixture case covers one maintained single-skill contract record. It does not prove runtime checker execution, fixture coverage, CLI checks, tests, suite automation, package publication, code-contract validation, release readiness, or future AI behavior without separate current evidence.
